name: Criminal Law
student_summary: Prosecute or defend in criminal courts.
overview: Prosecute or defend in criminal courts. Criminal Law sits in the Legal Practice family of Law, Government & Public Policy. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You are drawn to legal practice and want a broad path you can shape
who_should_avoid: You want a short, easy study path — this one demands years of serious preparation
Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
You want a laptop-anywhere lifestyle — this work happens in person
daily_responsibilities: Apply criminal procedure to real problems
Collaborate with your team using evidence analysis
Keep improving at cross-examination — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
problem_solving_style: Adaptive — mix analysis, action and people skills as the situation demands
alternative_paths: Company Secretary route to corporate governance
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
advantages: Strong earning ceiling (₹40 LPA+ at senior levels)
A broad Legal Practice foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
A long, demanding preparation and learning curve
Location-bound work; postings and relocation are part of the deal
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Criminal Law is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of evidence analysis
projects: Beginner: explore criminal procedure with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Legal databases
smaller_city_scope: Concentrated in bigger hubs today; smaller-city presence is growing slowly.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Litigation & Advocacy: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Crime Scene Investigation: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Judiciary & Judicial Services: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Criminal Law pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹3 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹40 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on English, Polity. Typical degrees: BA LLB, criminal practice apprenticeship. Alternatives exist: 3-year llb after any degree.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is minimal — deeply human/physical work. Broad paths like Criminal Law evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Criminal Law is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
